items.line_en: Good morning, Lara. I'm glad we have a moment to chat.

coach.say: Good morning, Lara. I'm glad we have a moment to chat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / Lara. / I'm glad we have a moment to chat.

items.line_en: I wanted to talk about something very important that helps our classroom be a happy place to learn.

coach.say: I wanted to talk about something very important that helps our classroom be a happy place to learn.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I wanted to talk about something very important that helps our classroom be a happy place to learn.

items.line_en: We're going to talk about our classroom manners.

coach.say: We're going to talk about our classroom manners.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We're going to talk about our classroom manners.

items.line_en: Good morning, Lara. I'm glad we have a moment to chat.

coach.say: Good morning, Lara. I'm glad we have a moment to chat.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Good morning, / Lara. / I'm glad we have a moment to chat.

items.line_en: So, let's start with this.

coach.say: So, let's start with this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So, / let's start with this.

items.line_en: Can you think of the most important rule when someone else is speaking,

coach.say: Can you think of the most important rule when someone else is speaking,
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you think of the most important rule when / someone else is speaking,

items.line_en: like when a friend is sharing an idea?

coach.say: like when a friend is sharing an idea?
coach.hint: Chunk it: like when / a friend is sharing an idea?

items.line_en: Is it that we should be quiet and listen with our whole bodies, sir?

coach.say: Is it that we should be quiet and listen with our whole bodies, sir?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Is it that we should be quiet and listen with our whole bodies, / sir?

items.line_en: That's a brilliant way to put it.

coach.say: That's a brilliant way to put it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's a brilliant way to put it.

items.line_en: Listening with our whole bodies.

coach.say: Listening with our whole bodies.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Listening with our whole bodies.

items.line_en: That means our eyes are watching and our voices are off.

coach.say: That means our eyes are watching and our voices are off.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That means our eyes are watching and / our voices are off.

items.line_en: It shows respect. Well done.

coach.say: It shows respect. Well done.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It shows respect. / Well done.

items.line_en: Now, what if you have a fantastic idea you want to share?

coach.say: Now, what if you have a fantastic idea you want to share?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now, / what if you have a fantastic idea you want to share?

items.line_en: What's the polite way to let me know instead of just shouting out?

coach.say: What's the polite way to let me know instead of just shouting out?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the polite way to let me know instead of just shouting out?

items.line_en: You put your hand up, sir, and you wait patiently without making a sound.

coach.say: You put your hand up, sir, and you wait patiently without making a sound.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You put your hand up, / sir, / and you wait patiently without making a sound.

items.line_en: Excellent. You put your hand up and wait.

coach.say: Excellent. You put your hand up and wait.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Excellent. / You put your hand up and wait.

items.line_en: That way, everyone gets a fair turn to speak, and our classroom stays calm and orderly.

coach.say: That way, everyone gets a fair turn to speak, and our classroom stays calm and orderly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That way, / everyone gets a fair turn to speak, / and our classroom stays calm and orderly.

items.line_en: Wonderful.

coach.say: Wonderful.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wonderful.

items.line_en: Let's talk about some magic words we use every day.

coach.say: Let's talk about some magic words we use every day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's talk about some magic words we use every day.

items.line_en: They are magical for making people feel good.

coach.say: They are magical for making people feel good.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They are magical for making people feel good.

items.line_en: Can you name one for me?

coach.say: Can you name one for me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you name one for me?

items.line_en: Please.

coach.say: Please.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please.

items.line_en: Like, could I have a new sheet of paper, please?

coach.say: Like, could I have a new sheet of paper, please?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Like, / could I have a new sheet of paper, / please?

items.line_en: Perfect. And what would you say after I gave you that paper?

coach.say: Perfect. And what would you say after I gave you that paper?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perfect. / And what would you say after I gave you that paper?

items.line_en: Thank you very much.

coach.say: Thank you very much.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you very much.

items.line_en: Exactly. Please and thank you are so important.

coach.say: Exactly. Please and thank you are so important.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Exactly. / Please and thank you are so important.

items.line_en: They show gratitude and make our classroom a friendlier place.

coach.say: They show gratitude and make our classroom a friendlier place.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They show gratitude and / make our classroom a friendlier place.

items.line_en: Don't forget, excuse me too.

coach.say: Don't forget, excuse me too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget, / excuse me too.

items.line_en: All right. Thinking about our room.

coach.say: All right. Thinking about our room.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All right. / Thinking about our room.

items.line_en: How should we treat our shared space with all our lovely books, games, and art supplies?

coach.say: How should we treat our shared space with all our lovely books, games, and art supplies?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How should we treat our shared space with all our lovely books, / games, / and art supplies?

items.line_en: We must be tidy.

coach.say: We must be tidy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We must be tidy.

items.line_en: We should put things back where they belong when we finished.

coach.say: We should put things back where they belong when we finished.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We should put things back where they belong when / we finished.

items.line_en: That way, our classroom looks nice, and we don't lose anything.

coach.say: That way, our classroom looks nice, and we don't lose anything.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That way, / our classroom looks nice, / and we don't lose anything.

items.line_en: That's a very responsible answer. You're right.

coach.say: That's a very responsible answer. You're right.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's a very responsible answer. / You're right.

items.line_en: When we keep our classroom tidy, it shows we respect our things and each other.

coach.say: When we keep our classroom tidy, it shows we respect our things and each other.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When we keep our classroom tidy, / it shows we respect our things and each other.

items.line_en: It's all part of being a team.

coach.say: It's all part of being a team.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's all part of being a team.

items.line_en: Speaking of teams, when we work with a partner, what are the special manners we need to remember?

coach.say: Speaking of teams, when we work with a partner, what are the special manners we need to remember?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Speaking of teams, / when we work with a partner, / what are the special manners we need to remember?

items.line_en: We should use our inside voices so we don't disturb other groups, and we have to share and listen to our partners' ideas,

coach.say: We should use our inside voices so we don't disturb other groups, and we have to share and listen to our partners' ideas,
coach.hint: Chunk it: We should use our inside voices so we don't disturb other groups, / and we have to share and listen to our partners' ideas,

items.line_en: not just talk all the time.

coach.say: not just talk all the time.
coach.hint: Chunk it: not just talk all the time.

items.line_en: That's wonderful. Taking turns, sharing, and listening are the keys to being a great team player.

coach.say: That's wonderful. Taking turns, sharing, and listening are the keys to being a great team player.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's wonderful. / Taking turns, / sharing, / and listening are the keys to being a great team player.

items.line_en: It helps everyone feel included.

coach.say: It helps everyone feel included.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It helps everyone feel included.

items.line_en: So we have listening, raising our hands, using polite words, being tidy, and teamwork.

coach.say: So we have listening, raising our hands, using polite words, being tidy, and teamwork.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So we have listening, raising our hands, / using polite words, being tidy, and teamwork.

items.line_en: What's the one golden rule that covers everything?

coach.say: What's the one golden rule that covers everything?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What's the one golden rule that covers everything?

items.line_en: Is it just be kind to everyone?

coach.say: Is it just be kind to everyone?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Is it just be kind to everyone?

items.line_en: Yes, that's it. The golden rule. Be kind.

coach.say: Yes, that's it. The golden rule. Be kind.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / that's it. / The golden rule. / Be kind.

items.line_en: If we are always trying to be kind, all the other manners will just happen naturally.

coach.say: If we are always trying to be kind, all the other manners will just happen naturally.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If we are always trying to be kind, / all the other manners will just happen naturally.

items.line_en: Kindness is including people and using a friendly voice.

coach.say: Kindness is including people and using a friendly voice.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Kindness is including people and / using a friendly voice.

items.line_en: You have given such wonderful and clever answers. I'm so proud of how thoughtful you are.

coach.say: You have given such wonderful and clever answers. I'm so proud of how thoughtful you are.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You have given such wonderful and clever answers. / I'm so proud of how thoughtful you are.

items.line_en: Let's remember these manners every day. Well done!

coach.say: Let's remember these manners every day. Well done!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's remember these manners every day. / Well done!
